title: Iran War Live Updates: As Trump’s New Ultimatum Looms, Tehran Vows to Step Up Attacks
summary_full: President Trump has threatened to strike power plants and bridges in Iran on Tuesday if Tehran does not open the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil shipping route. Iran said it would respond “more crushingly” if civilian infrastructure was targeted.
